sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit index bit-reversal used to load DIT input order.
sub_modules.fft16_address_gen: Combinational stage and butterfly counter decoder producing p, q, and twiddle indices for the 16-point radix-2 DIT schedule.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 with FFT/IFFT sine sign selection.
sub_modules.fft16_complex_mult_q15: Combinational rounded Q1.15 complex multiplier for twiddle rotation.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 butterfly that rotates the q operand and produces sum and difference outputs.
